prompt: Which manager led the Boston Red Sox to their 2013 World Series championship against the St. Louis Cardinals?
explanation: John Farrell was the manager who guided the Boston Red Sox to a 4–2 series victory over St. Louis in 2013.

prompt: Who was the manager of the Houston Astros when they lost the 2005 World Series to the Chicago White Sox?
explanation: Phil Garner managed the Houston Astros during their first World Series appearance in 2005, where they were swept 4–0.

prompt: Which team won the 2015 World Series under the management of Ned Yost?
explanation: Ned Yost managed the Kansas City Royals to a 4–1 series victory against the New York Mets to win the 2015 title.

prompt: Who was the manager of the San Francisco Giants when they lost the 2002 World Series to the Anaheim Angels?
explanation: Dusty Baker managed the San Francisco Giants during their grueling 7-game World Series loss to Anaheim in 2002.

prompt: Which team did the Los Angeles Dodgers defeat 4–2 to win the 2020 World Series championship?
explanation: The Los Angeles Dodgers, managed by Dave Roberts, defeated the Tampa Bay Rays 4–2 in the 2020 World Series.

prompt: Who was the head manager of the Philadelphia Phillies during their 2022 World Series appearance against Houston?
explanation: Rob Thomson took over and managed the Philadelphia Phillies to the World Series in 2022, where they lost 4–2.

prompt: Which team did the New York Yankees defeat 4–1 in the 2000 World Series to win the Subway Series?
explanation: Joe Torre's New York Yankees defeated Bobby Valentine's New York Mets 4–1 in the historic 2000 matchup.

prompt: Who managed the Arizona Diamondbacks when they returned to the World Series in 2023, losing to the Texas Rangers?
explanation: Torey Lovullo was the manager of the Arizona Diamondbacks during their 2023 World Series run.

prompt: Which team was swept 4–0 by the Chicago White Sox in the 2005 World Series?
explanation: The Houston Astros made the World Series as a National League team in 2005 but were swept by the White Sox.

prompt: Who was the manager of the Cleveland Indians when they lost the 2016 World Series in 7 games?
explanation: Terry Francona managed the Cleveland Indians during their historic 7-game World Series battle against the Cubs.

statement: The Los Angeles Dodgers defeated the Toronto Blue Jays 4–3 to win the 2025 World Series under manager Dave Roberts.
explanation: According to the table, Dave Roberts led the Dodgers to a 4–3 series victory against John Schneider's Blue Jays in 2025.

statement: Charlie Manuel managed the Philadelphia Phillies in both the 2008 and 2009 World Series.
explanation: Charlie Manuel successfully led the Phillies to the World Series in 2008 (won 4–1) and 2009 (lost 4–2).

statement: The San Francisco Giants were managed by Dusty Baker when they won the 2010 World Series.
explanation: Bruce Bochy was the manager who led the San Francisco Giants to their 2010 championship victory.

statement: The Boston Red Sox won the 2018 World Series under manager Alex Cora by defeating the Los Angeles Dodgers.
explanation: Alex Cora guided the Red Sox to a 4–1 series victory over Dave Roberts' Dodgers in 2018.

statement: The Florida Marlins won the 2003 World Series by sweeping the New York Yankees 4–0.
explanation: The Florida Marlins won the 2003 World Series in six games, with a final series score of 4–2.

statement: A.J. Hinch managed the Houston Astros during both the 2017 and 2019 World Series.
explanation: A.J. Hinch was at the helm for the Astros in 2017 (won 4–3) and 2019 (lost 4–3).

statement: Ron Washington managed the Texas Rangers to a World Series championship in the 2011 season.
explanation: Ron Washington's Rangers lost the 2011 World Series 4–3 to Tony La Russa's St. Louis Cardinals.

prompt: Order these World Series runners-up chronologically by the year they reached the Fall Classic (earliest first).
explanation: Order: Houston Astros (2005), Detroit Tigers (2012), Los Angeles Dodgers (2018), New York Yankees (2024).

prompt: Order these managers based on when they won their first World Series title listed in this table (earliest first).
explanation: Order: Mike Scioscia (2002), Tony La Russa (2006), Dave Martinez (2019), Dusty Baker (2022).

prompt: Order these championship series based on the total number of games played to decide the winner (fewest to most).
explanation: Order: 2012 (4 games), 2015 (5 games), 2013 (6 games), 2017 (7 games).
The Chicago White Sox swept the Houston Astros 4–0 to win their first title in 88 years.
Joe Maddon coached the Cubs to an epic 4–3 comeback victory to end their 108-year championship drought.
Bruce Bochy led the Texas Rangers to a 4–1 series victory over the Diamondbacks to win the title.

prompt: Which team won the 2004 World Series to break the famous 86-year championship drought known as the Curse of the Bambino?
explanation: Terry Francona's Boston Red Sox swept the St. Louis Cardinals 4–0 in 2004 to win their first title since 1918.

prompt: Who was the manager of the Detroit Tigers when they reached the World Series in 2006 and lost 4–1 to St. Louis?
explanation: Jim Leyland managed the Detroit Tigers to the American League pennant in 2006, where they fell to the Cardinals.

prompt: Which team did the San Francisco Giants defeat 4–0 in a clean sweep to claim the 2012 World Series title?
explanation: Bruce Bochy's Giants completely shut down Jim Leyland's Detroit Tigers, sweeping the series 4–0.

prompt: Who was the manager of the New York Yankees during their 2000 and 2001 consecutive World Series appearances?
explanation: Joe Torre was the historic manager who led the Yankees to the Fall Classic in both 2000 (won) and 2001 (lost).

prompt: Which team made its first-ever World Series appearance in 2007 as a Wild Card entry under manager Clint Hurdle?
explanation: The Colorado Rockies won the National League pennant as a Wild Card in 2007 before getting swept by Boston.

prompt: Who managed the Chicago Cubs during their historic 2016 World Series championship, ending a 108-year drought?
explanation: Joe Maddon successfully guided the Chicago Cubs to a dramatic 4–3 Game 7 victory over the Cleveland Indians.

prompt: Which team lost the 2015 World Series in 5 games (4–1) to the Kansas City Royals?
explanation: The New York Mets, managed by Terry Collins, won the National League in 2015 but lost the series to the Royals.

prompt: Who was the manager of the Texas Rangers when they captured the 2023 World Series title?
explanation: Bruce Bochy came out of retirement to lead the Texas Rangers to a 4–1 series win over Arizona in 2023.

prompt: Who was the losing manager of the New York Yankees during the 2003 World Series against the Florida Marlins?
explanation: Joe Torre was the manager when the heavily favored Yankees were upset 4–2 by Jack McKeon's Marlins in 2003.

statement: The Los Angeles Dodgers won back-to-back World Series titles in 2024 and 2025 under manager Dave Roberts.
explanation: Dave Roberts successfully led the Dodgers to consecutive titles, defeating the Yankees 4–1 in 2024 and the Blue Jays 4–3 in 2025.

statement: The Houston Astros defeated the Philadelphia Phillies 4–2 to win the 2022 World Series under manager Dusty Baker.
explanation: Dusty Baker won his first World Series ring as a manager when the Astros took down Rob Thomson's Phillies in 2022.

statement: The Arizona Diamondbacks were swept 4–0 by the New York Yankees in the 2001 World Series.
explanation: The 2001 World Series was an epic 7-game thriller (4–3) won by Bob Brenly and the Arizona Diamondbacks.

statement: John Farrell managed the Boston Red Sox to a World Series championship victory against the St. Louis Cardinals in 2013.
explanation: John Farrell coached the Red Sox to a 4–2 series victory over St. Louis, clinching the title at Fenway Park.

statement: The San Francisco Giants won the 2014 World Series by defeating the Kansas City Royals in exactly five games (4–1).
explanation: The 2014 World Series was a grueling 7-game classic, with Bruce Bochy's Giants winning the series 4–3.

statement: John Schneider managed the Toronto Blue Jays to the World Series in the 2025 season.
explanation: According to the table, John Schneider managed the Blue Jays in 2025 when they reached the Fall Classic but lost 4–3 to the Dodgers.

statement: The Tampa Bay Rays won the American League pennant in 2008 under manager Joe Maddon.
explanation: Joe Maddon led the Rays to their first World Series appearance in 2008, where they lost 4–1 to Philadelphia.

prompt: Order these World Series runners-up chronologically by the year they reached the Fall Classic (earliest first).
explanation: Order: San Francisco Giants (2002), Colorado Rockies (2007), Texas Rangers (2010), Toronto Blue Jays (2025).

prompt: Order these managers based on when they won their first World Series title listed in this table (earliest first).
explanation: Order: Joe Torre (2000), Terry Francona (2004), Ozzie Guillén (2005), Dave Martinez (2019).

prompt: Order these championship series based on the total number of games played to decide the winner (fewest to most).
